steps.title: Explain the nevertheless
steps.content: Seira and colleagues found that risk-disclosure messages had only small, short-lived effects. They still thought those effects might be worth pursuing because the cost of messaging was negligible.

steps.title: Identify the cost factor
steps.content: B adds an unmentioned message type. C wrongly says the effects may be small relative to costs, and D treats cost as evidence of greater effectiveness. The answer is A.
